message:
feat: add prominent explore banner and new testimonials

- Add horizontal banner-style navigation above footer with icons
- Three cards: Integrations, Shoutouts, Showcase
- Consistent hover animations with other cards
- Mobile responsive (single column on small screens)
- Add testimonials from @coyotevn and @AlbertMoral
